name: Palmr
compose:
name: slashnode-palmr
services:
  server:
    image: kyantech/palmr:v3.3.2-beta
    container_name: palmr
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PALMR_UID: '1000'
      PALMR_GID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - server_data:/app/server
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8075:5487
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data:
    name: slashnode-palmr_server_data
